what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named company-info/p-04 in the design-source channel; it stores YAML frontmatter with identifiers, a blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, provenance, and a one-line caption stating it is source design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, width, height, source, author_session, created timestamp, and empty links array
Image dimensions w and h are both 0
Trailing body text reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — company-info/p-04.jpg'
standouts: Width and height are recorded as 0 despite being an image/jpeg record
Empty links array with no cross-references
Blob URI uses a b2: prefix with a long hash
concerns: Zero width and height may indicate missing or unprocessed image metadata rather than an actual 0x0 image
No links or description of image content makes the record hard to use without inspecting the blob
notes: A sparse design-source image ledger entry for company-info/p-04 that points to a blob but lacks dimensions and descriptive content.
questions: What visual content does company-info/p-04.jpg actually contain?
Is the empty links array intentional or simply not yet linked to related records?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record source design ground-truth for an image; actual content is a metadata stub that does that for identity and provenance but omits image dimensions and content description.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to establish a canonical, timestamped, authorship-linked record for a design-source image asset so it can be referenced within a company-info media channel.
novelty: The use of a blob://b2: hash URI alongside channel-memory addressing and an explicit 'SOURCE design ground-truth' caption is distinctive; the zero-dimension image record is unusual.
contribution: It contributes a stable metadata identity and provenance anchor for a design-source image blob, which a fused system can keep as a reference record even if dimensions and links are later enriched.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for the JPEG image asset company-info/p-04 in the design-source channel, referencing blob b2:b22a04311bc02ca2f6e5989131b242cb with zero dimensions and creation provenance.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and ground-truth a design-source image asset for the company-info channel with identity, blob reference, and authorship timestamp.
